#  Approve or Reject an Invoice in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Contract Room is a shared portal where vendors can submit change orders and invoices directly to the project team for approval throughout the duration of the project. The Invoices tab of the Contract Room is where invoices can be approved or rejected.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Full Access' to the project or higher.


##  Video 
##  Steps 
#### To approve an invoice:
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note:_ Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  3. Click on the pending invoice that you want to review.
  4. In the Invoice Status section, click **Approve**.  
![Approve Invoice](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/654024f285fcf8fd3f71fdc8778d1eb2/b93f96f72c8cca2cda125c1949dac6d0/approve-invoice.png?fm=webp)
  5. Click **Approve** to confirm the approval.


#### To reject an invoice:
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note:_ Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  3. Click on the pending invoice that you want to review.
  4. In the Invoice Status section, click **Reject**.  
  
![Reject Invoice](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7fe7ddd5632f92e8a906679f0c66a587/30dc7b752d420f2ad525584bbcd49421/reject-invoice.png?fm=webp)  

  5. _Optional:_ Enter a comment that explains the reason for the rejection.
  6. Click **Reject**.  
_Note:_ A **speech bubble** ![Icon Speech Bubble Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/90105aa038fbe725edf54c8f1c4c55a2/b4ad8c104ee0fc3b246dd7af3a97fcfc/icon-speech-bubble-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon appears next to 'Rejected' if a comment was entered. The icon can be hovered over to view the reason for the rejection.

title: Approve or Reject an Invoice in Portfolio Financials
description: How to approve or reject an invoice in the Contract Room of Portfolio Financials.
